title: A Moment That Isn't Afraid
prose: Even a Hogwarts run by the Carrows has odd, unguarded pockets of time in it — a corridor nobody's patrolling for ten minutes, a friend willing to trade jokes in a whisper, a shaft of ordinary afternoon light through a window that hasn't yet been ruined by anything.
It doesn't undo the rest of the year. It's not supposed to. It's just proof that the rest of the year hasn't managed to take everything yet.

choices.label: You hold onto it for as long as it lasts.
You can't quite let yourself relax, even here.
